full_text:
Zong Yu (Deyan) 宗預 (德艷)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zong Yu (宗預), styledDeyan (德艷), was born in Anzhong in Nanyang. Shu official. Sent to Wu to ask about Wu’s increased border guard after Zhuge Liang died. Zong Yu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zong Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
